description.ko: 우주의 가장 깊은 심연을 들여다보는 장엄하고도 경외심을 불러일으키는 시선으로, 침묵하는 보랏빛 중력에 의해 빛과 물질이 소멸되는 과정을 담고 있습니다.
description.en: A majestic and terrifying look into the deepest abyss of the universe, where light and matter are consumed by a silent, violet gravitational force.

prompt: A cinematic 8k render of VOID-3, titled 'The Singularity's Veil.' A massive swirling vortex of #0D0221 obsidian dark matter and #3D1A78 deep violet energy at the center of the universe. Gossamer-thin #7B68EE lavender nebula tendrils are being pulled into a gravitational singularity, creating a lens-warping effect. Distant #E6E6FA soft lavender star clusters flicker through thick cosmic dust. Atmosphere of infinite scale and divine majesty, hyper-realistic space photography aesthetic, volumetric lighting.
